title: radiogrammitis havilandii
intro: Radiogrammitis havilandii, also known as the Haviland's grammitid, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Radiogrammitis havilandii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. Radiogrammitis havilandii can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
